name: Pricing Display Format
prompt: Compare monthly vs annual pricing display formats. The annual version includes savings badges and per-year billing info. Measure plan selection rate and revenue per user.
context: Monthly vs annual pricing display with savings badge comparison.

monthly.description: Standard monthly pricing display — simple per-month price
notes: Shows Starter at $9/mo and Pro at $29/mo

annual.description: Annual pricing with savings badges and yearly billing info
highlights: BEST VALUE badge on Pro plan
notes: Shows Starter at $7/mo (save 22%) and Pro at $22/mo (save 24%)
